description: A forklift has damaged a container of Sodium Cyanide near Sulfuric Acid storage tanks. Use the CAMEO Chemicals reactivity prediction tool (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/) to predict the outcome of mixing Sulfuric Acid (UN 1830) and Sodium Cyanide (UN 1689). Document all predicted hazards, reaction products, hazard types, severity, and emergency response recommendations. Save your findings to ~/Documents/reactivity_report.txt. Additional scenario details are available in ~/Desktop/reactivity_scenario.txt.
